results.title: TriCo Bancshares Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend
results.description: The Board of Directors of TriCo Bancshares (NASDAQ: TCBK) (the “Company”), parent company of Tri Counties Bank, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.36 (thirty-six cents) per share on its common stock, no par value, on May 21, 2026. The dividend is payable on June 26, 2026, to holders of record as of June 5, 2026, and represents the 147th consecutive quarterly cash dividend paid to shareholders.

results.title: Sioux City’s new water park, Siouxland Splash, won’t open by Memorial Day Weekend
results.description: After a discussion with subcontractors, Siouxland Splash says the opening day for Sioux City’s new waterpark will be delayed.

Is There Too Much Construction on the Croatian Coast?
results.description: May the 23rd, 2026 – There is plenty of construction along the Croatian coast, with some of it having not exactly been legal in the past.
